Content_Sketch: The first time you looked at them in the mirror. You almost asked.
Illustration_Note: POV rearview mirror showing blurred face in backseat - sedan interior - dark

Content_Sketch: Now you turn the radio up when they cry.
Illustration_Note: Stickman hand reaching for radio dial - backseat figure crying - radio glow

Content_Sketch: Taxi driver. You know the roads. You know the silence.
Illustration_Note: Stickman driving taxi in daylight - old vest - ID lanyard - city streets

Content_Sketch: Someone noticed you were reliable and quiet. A new phone arrives.
Illustration_Note: Stickman receiving phone from unseen hand - nondescript room - 2 phones on table

Content_Sketch: You kiss your daughter before leaving. You tell her: morning.
Illustration_Note: Stickman leaning over small sleeping child stickman - dark room - doorway light

Content_Sketch: The phone buzzes. Coordinates. A time. A number: 6.
Illustration_Note: POV phone screen showing coordinates and number 6 - dark car interior

Content_Sketch: A person with no bag gets in the backseat. You check the rearview. You see their face. You almost speak.
Illustration_Note: POV rearview mirror - young stickman with worried face sitting in backseat - no bag

Content_Sketch: You do not ask. That is the first time. You know you just did something wrong. But the car keeps moving.
Illustration_Note: Sedan on empty road at dusk - stickman driving with both hands on wheel - tense posture

Content_Sketch: They ask: where are you taking me? You say nothing. They try to talk more. You turn the radio up. Just enough.
Illustration_Note: Backseat stickman leaning forward speaking - driver stickman reaching for radio - night highway

Content_Sketch: You check the rearview. They are younger than your daughter. You turn the mirror away.
Illustration_Note: POV rearview mirror showing young face - then mirror tilting to show only dark road

Content_Sketch: Traffic stop. You smile. Cousin visiting a doctor. The officer waves you through.
Illustration_Note: Sedan stopped - officer stickman with flashlight at window - driver stickman smiling - night

Content_Sketch: The phone buzzes mid-drive: faster. The donor is prepped. The clock is real.
Illustration_Note: POV phone screen showing message - speedometer needle rising slightly - night road

Content_Sketch: Double run. Same night. You say yes before he finishes the sentence.
Illustration_Note: Stickman on phone in parked car - nodding - envelope on dashboard - late night

Content_Sketch: First cooler. Heavy in a way you did not expect. You put the towel on the seat. You do not look at it. You drive.
Illustration_Note: Stickman placing cooler on backseat towel - looking away - sedan interior - dim

Content_Sketch: You recognize the road. You know the exact pothole where the cooler slides.
Illustration_Note: Sedan on familiar road - stickman driving one-handed - other hand steadying invisible cargo

Content_Sketch: Their face on a missing persons post. Same angle as the mirror. You stop your thumb. Then scroll past.
Illustration_Note: POV phone screen showing missing person post - thumb hovering - then scrolling

Content_Sketch: The cooler shifts. A wet sound - dull and heavy - inside sealed plastic.
Illustration_Note: Cooler on backseat slightly tilted - towel bunched - dark sedan interior - red tail lights outside

Content_Sketch: You reach back without looking. Adjust the towel. Other hand on the wheel. No flinch. No stop. No thought.
Illustration_Note: Stickman reaching back with one arm - other hand on wheel - eyes forward - highway lights streaking

Content_Sketch: You check the rearview. You are checking if the cooler shifted. Not the person.
Illustration_Note: POV rearview mirror showing cooler on towel - no person - empty backseat - night

Content_Sketch: Silence.
Illustration_Note: Black frame - only dashboard light glow - AC display showing 18 - silence

Content_Sketch: Home. Daughter asleep. You stand outside her door. You do not go in. You check the phone.
Illustration_Note: Stickman standing in hallway - child room door slightly open - light inside - phone glowing in hand

Content_Sketch: You train a new driver. You show him the route. You tell him: don't look in the mirror too long.
Illustration_Note: Two stickmen in sedan - driver explaining - passenger stickman nervous - daylight road

Content_Sketch: You check the rearview. You hope it is a cooler. People are harder.
Illustration_Note: POV rearview mirror - empty backseat - towel folded neatly - waiting

Content_Sketch: You do not call anyone back. You eat alone.
Illustration_Note: Stickman sitting alone at small table - food - phone face down - empty room

Content_Sketch: The phone buzzes. New coordinates. You start the engine. Tuesday.
Illustration_Note: Stickman in sedan - phone buzz - hand on ignition - mechanical posture - morning light

Content_Sketch: You used to look in the mirror. You used to see a face.
Illustration_Note: Rearview mirror reflection - ghosted double exposure: face fading into empty backseat

Content_Sketch: You don't adjust the mirror anymore. There is nothing back there you need to see.
Illustration_Note: POV rearview mirror - fixed angle - empty backseat - towel - no cooler - no person - highway stretching ahead
